meaning: n.粉笔,白垩vt.用粉笔写,和以白垩
examples: You may chalk it on the wall.
Think of a simple object—a piece of chalk, for example.
It's not over yet—not by a long chalk.
Whenever I cross the (white chalk) line, I am trying to help the team.
This synthetic chalk could substitute for some of the Portland cement now used in construction.
